evals.prompt: Run today's paper learning daily report in dry-run mode and explain what would be sent to Notion and Feishu.
evals.expected_output: Uses paper-learning, runs or describes run_daily_learning.py with --dry-run, and separates Notion control-plane updates from Feishu delivery.

evals.prompt: I selected two papers in Notion and wrote reading instructions. Process the queue without overwriting my manual research-area edits.
evals.expected_output: Uses paper-learning, runs or describes process_notion_queue.py, preserves manual Research Areas, and updates Deep Notes.

evals.prompt: Add a new archive category suggestion flow for papers that do not match my existing Notion taxonomy.
evals.expected_output: Uses paper-learning and explains Proposed Area plus Needs Human Review rather than directly creating taxonomy entries.
